text:
There once was a little girl named Holly. She lived next door to an old oak tree. Her favorite thing to do was sit beside the tree. One day a squirrel climbed up onto the branch.

"Hello!" Holly said.

The squirrel chirped.

"How're you doing?"

The squirrel twirled its tail.

"I'm just fine, thank you." Holly smiled.

One afternoon, when Holly was playing, she saw something strange: a flock of birds swooping down. They were gathering something...

Holly followed their flightpath.

What was it?

They brought something back...

Woody!

But why?

Those were woodpeckers!

They wanted revenge.

And what for?

That wicked old owl?

They swooped down and drove him right into the oak tree.

Holly laughed.

From that day forward, they were good friends. She sat beside the tree.

The owl had feathers, wings—I loved owl costumes!

They went owl golfing.

That summer, they watched fireworks together
